meta.title: ARISE — Willian Daniel · Full-Stack Portfolio
meta.description: Willian Daniel's Solo Leveling-themed portfolio: level up by exploring the projects (Gates) and awaken as a Player.

home.title: ARISE
home.subtitle: Willian Daniel's Full-Stack Portfolio
home.intro: You have acquired the qualification to become a Player. Explore the Gates, earn XP and climb from Rank E to S.

boss.title: Face the Boss
boss.desc: Unlock and open the Rank S project.

boot.prompt: You have acquired the qualification to become a Player. Do you accept?

profile.role: The Monarch — owner of this System
profile.hint: Above is the Monarch (fixed S-rank). You are the Player in the HUD — climb from E to S by exploring the Gates.

gates.title: Gates
gates.subtitle: Each project is a Dungeon ranked E–S. The stronger ones unlock as you level up.
gates.analyzeHint: Technical details and architecture decisions arrive when the Gate is built.

awakening.name: The Awakening
awakening.summary: A gamified to-do app: tasks grant XP and the user levels up. Fundamentals of UI and local state.

lesserPortal.name: The Lesser Portal
lesserPortal.summary: A Node API with Express, JWT and full CRUD, consumed by a React front end. REST, auth and SQL — the full-stack staple.

integrationDungeon.name: The Integration Dungeon
integrationDungeon.summary: A panel that unifies several external APIs in one place — Willian's home turf: systems integration.

realtimeBattle.name: The Real-Time Battlefield
realtimeBattle.summary: A live chat or dashboard with Socket.io. Real-time architecture that few portfolios show.

automatedForge.name: The Automated Forge
automatedForge.summary: Ingests data, generates and schedules automated reports. With Cypress tests and a CI/CD pipeline.

finalBoss.name: The Final Boss
finalBoss.summary: Auth, database, robust Node back end, polished front end, E2E tests, CI/CD and deploy. The flagship that proves full-stack.

skills.title: Skill Tree
skills.subtitle: The Hunter's attributes, translated straight from the CV.

education.ucb: B.Sc. in Software Engineering — Catholic University of Brasília (2025–2028)

int.name: INT · Integrations & Automation
int.desc: The highest attribute — connecting and automating systems.

branchGuardian.name: Branch Guardian
branchGuardian.desc: Blocked 60% of non-compliant PRs via integration tests.

about.title: The Hunter's Story
about.subtitle: Willian Daniel's journey.
about.p1: A full-stack developer focused on React and Node.js, with real strength in systems integration and process automation.
about.p2: At RCS he connected services such as Microsoft Graph, TrueNAS, GLPI, TOTVS and Skymail, and automated routines that cut manual work and raised delivery quality.
about.p3: A quality guardian: integration tests, Cypress and CI/CD to keep branches clean and reports accurate.

contact.title: Summon the Hunter
contact.subtitle: Shall we build something together?
contact.note: The summoning form arrives in a later phase — for now, the call goes straight to email.
